name: Omelets
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine eggs, milk, salt and pepper; beat until well blended.
2. Melt butter in a 10-inch, heat-resistant, non-metallic pie pan in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds. Rotate the pan so it is completely coated with butter.
3. Pour the egg mixture into the pie pan and cover tightly with plastic wrap.
4. Heat in the Microwave Oven for 1 1/2 minutes.
5. With a rubber spatula or fork, gently move the cooked eggs toward the center of the pan.
6. Cover and heat, covered with plastic wrap, in the Microwave Oven for an additional 1 1/4 minutes.
7. Let stand, covered, at least 1 1/2 minutes.
8. Loosen the egg from the pie pan with a rubber spatula. Fold the omelet in half and place on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter. If the omelet is not cooked enough, return it to the Microwave Oven for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Variations:
Cheese Omelet: Sprinkle the omelet with 1/2 cup shredded cheese after Step 6. Cover and return to the Microwave Oven for an additional 30 seconds to melt the cheese. Continue with Step 7.
Bacon Omelet: Cook bacon before preparing the omelet. Crumble bacon into the egg mixture during Step 1. If desired, some of the bacon drippings may be used in place of the butter.
Western Omelet: Add 1/4 cup chopped onion, 1/4 cup chopped green pepper, and 1/4 cup diced ham to the egg mixture during Step 1. Heat an additional minute during Steps 4 and 6.
Onion Omelet: Add 1/2 cup sauteed onions to the egg mixture during Step 1.
